'''tarunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylophagaid|xylophagaid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylophagaid|xylophagaid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tarunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tærinith|tærinith]] || [[word:tærinij|tærinij]] || [[word:tærinish|tærinish]] || [[word:tærini|tærini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tarurunuth|tarurunuth]] || [[word:tarurunuj|tarurunuj]] || [[word:tarurunush|tarurunush]] || [[word:tarurunu|tarurunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tarunuth|tarunuth]] || [[word:tarunuj|tarunuj]] || [[word:tarunush|tarunush]] || [[word:tarunu|tarunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tarufnuth|tarufnuth]] || [[word:tarufnuj|tarufnuj]] || [[word:tarufnush|tarufnush]] || [[word:tarufnuf|tarufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tarunuthu|tarunuthu]] || [[word:tarunuju|tarunuju]] || [[word:tarunushu|tarunushu]] || [[word:tarunuku|tarunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tarunuth|tarunuth]] || [[word:tarunuj|tarunuj]] || [[word:tarunush|tarunush]] || [[word:tarunu|tarunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tarunuthul|tarunuthul]] || [[word:tarunujul|tarunujul]] || [[word:tarunushul|tarunushul]] || [[word:tarunukul|tarunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tarunuthuthu|tarunuthuthu]] || [[word:tarunujuju|tarunujuju]] || [[word:tarunushushu|tarunushushu]] || [[word:tarunuku|tarunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tarunuthun|tarunuthun]] || [[word:tarunujun|tarunujun]] || [[word:tarunushun|tarunushun]] || [[word:tarunukun|tarunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tarunuthuoro|tarunuthuoro]] || [[word:tarunujuoro|tarunujuoro]] || [[word:tarunushuoro|tarunushuoro]] || [[word:tarunukuoro|tarunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
